# netbox_ip_address (Data Source)

Fetches a single IP address from Netbox by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch a single IP address by ID.
data "netbox_ip_address" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "ip_address" {
  value = data.netbox_ip_address.example.ip_address
}

output "ip_status" {
  value = data.netbox_ip_address.example.status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the IP address.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description for the IP address.
- `dns_name` (String) DNS name associated with the IP address.
- `interface_id` (Number) The ID of the assigned interface.
- `interface_type` (String) The type of the assigned interface object.
- `ip_address` (String) The IP address in CIDR notation.
- `status` (String) The status of the IP address.
